summary: Iteration 103: Testing automation toggle feature, Intel Update button, and SMS hint removal. Backend toggle-automation endpoint verified (9/9 tests pass). Fixed frontend bug where webActionSheet state was missing, causing error when tapping automation chips. All features now working correctly.

backend.toggle_birthday_off: PASS - PATCH /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/toggle-automation toggles birthday field off
backend.toggle_birthday_back_on: PASS - Second toggle re-enables birthday automation
backend.toggle_invalid_field_rejected: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid field names
backend.toggle_missing_field_rejected: PASS - Returns 400 for missing field in body
backend.double_toggle_consistency: PASS - Double toggle returns to original state

frontend.feed_details_tabs: PASS - Feed and Details tabs visible and functional
frontend.stats_bar: PASS - Stats bar shows all 5 stats: touches (139), msgs (51), clicks (3), campaigns (1), referrals (0)
frontend.intel_update_button: PASS - Update button visible in Relationship Intel bar
frontend.no_sms_hint: PASS - No SMS hint text 'Tap send to open your SMS' on page
frontend.automation_chips_tappable: PASS - Tapping automation chip (Jun 1/Nov 7/May 10) shows action sheet
frontend.action_sheet_options: PASS - Action sheet shows 'Edit Date' and 'Pause/Resume Auto-Card' options
frontend.composer_visible: PASS - Composer with SMS/Email tabs visible at bottom on both tabs
frontend.details_tab_content: PASS - Details tab shows Voice Notes, Important Dates, Campaigns sections

bugs_fixed.issue: setWebActionSheet is not defined - clicking automation chips caused error
bugs_fixed.fix: Added webActionSheet state and Modal component to render the action sheet for web platform

critical_code_review_comments: Backend toggle-automation endpoint at /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/toggle-automation correctly validates field is one of: birthday, anniversary, sold_date
Scheduler respects disabled_automations - line 203-204 in scheduler.py checks 'if trigger_type in disabled'
Frontend handleAutomationChipPress function now works on web platform with the added webActionSheet state
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Forest Ward contact with dates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Automation toggle feature fully working. Tapping on automation date chips (birthday/anniversary/sold_date) shows action sheet with 'Edit Date' and 'Pause/Resume Auto-Card' options. Paused automations appear dimmed with pause icon. Intel Update button is in Relationship Intel bar with data-testid='intel-update-btn'. SMS hint banner has been removed from contact page.

mocked_api.twilio_sms: MOCKED - Twilio SMS is mocked, personal SMS flow opens native SMS app
